allow: PowerShell(@\('node', 'npm', 'pnpm', 'yarn', 'bun'\) | ForEach-Object { $cmd = Get-Command $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { "$_ -> $\($cmd.Source\)" } else { "$_ -> NOT FOUND" } })
PowerShell($cmd = Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { "winget OK: $\($cmd.Source\)" } else { "winget NOT FOUND" })
PowerShell(if \(Test-Path $PROFILE\) { "=== $PROFILE ==="; Get-Content $PROFILE } else { "PowerShell profile not present: $PROFILE" })
